Abducted by the Unseen.name: 被隐形者绑架 Abducted by the Unseen
Abducted by the Unseen.description:
你生命中的决定性事件，无论发生在童年还是成年，都是被他们绑架。你并不确定他们究竟是谁。你所知道的一切，是他们能够轻而易举地渗透进你的生活，在不留下任何痕迹或线索的情况下将你掳走；但在一段时间后，他们又把你释放了，只给你留下对那段失落时光模糊而朦胧的记忆。你可能会用某个古怪的称呼来称呼绑匪，比如“无形者”。无论你是想走出这次绑架的阴影，还是决心挖掘出更多细节，这次绑架都已永远改变了你，而你依靠特殊的魔法来保护他人不再遭遇你的命运。

选择两项能力提升。一项必须提升体质或感知，另一项为自由的能力提升。

你受训于神秘技能，以及阴谋学识（技能）。你获得@Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.Root Magic]{Root Magic}技能专长。

The formative event in your life, whether during your childhood or adulthood, was being abducted by them. You're not sure exactly who they are. All you know is that they were able to infiltrate your life easily enough to abduct you without any traces or clues, but then they released you some time later, leaving you with only a vague and hazy memory of your lost time. You might call your abductors something odd, like "The Unseen." Whether you're trying to move past your abduction or are determined to dig up details, your abduction has left you forever changed, and you rely on special magic to protect others from sharing your fate.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Constitution or Wisdom, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Occultism skill, and the Conspiracy Lore skill. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.Root Magic]{Root Magic} skill feat.

Horror's Godchild.name: 恐怖的教子 Horror's Godchild
Horror's Godchild.description:
多元宇宙中存在一些恐怖之物，最好永远不为人知；凡人本就不该见到它们。无论你是向一颗厄运之星许愿、你的父母做了邪恶的交易，甚至毫无缘由，其中某个恐怖之物都自认为是你的教父母，并以一种既可能给你带来救助、同样也极可能给你带来困扰的方式照看着你。更多时候，当你的教父母插手时，就轮到你去奉承他们，并阻止他们把某种灾变般的命运降临到那些不该承受的人身上；而当你真正身陷险境的时刻，他们却可能将其当作让你“汲取教训”的“学习经历”，好让你变得更强。

选择两个能力提升。一个必须提升力量或魅力，另一个为自由能力提升。

你受训于神秘技能，以及一个与你的教父母相关的学识（技能）（例如，若你的教父母是异怪，你可能受训于异怪学识；若他们是精类，你可能受训于精类学识）。你也可以向他们求助，但代价可能极其高昂。每当你尝试进行技能检定以回忆知识时，GM可以选择给你提供该检定+1环境加值，仿佛你的教父母正以其异界知识的一小片段在援助你。若你接受但检定失败，你的教父母会为“更好地帮助你”而倾泻一股异界信息洪流，使你陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2}状态，持续1分钟（大失败时为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 4}）。该迟钝值不能被任何会降低或防止该状态的效果所减少。

There are some horrors in the multiverse better off unknown, which mortal beings weren't meant to see. Whether you wished upon an ill-fated star, your parents made nefarious bargains, or even for no apparent reason whatsoever, one of those horrors considers itself your godparent and is looking out for you in a way that is at least as likely to cause you strife as it is to bring you succor. More often, when your godparent gets involved, it's up to you to flatter them and keep them from unleashing some sort of cataclysmic fate on those who don't deserve it, while they might ignore the moments you were in true peril as a "learning experience" that will make you grow stronger.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Strength or Charisma, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Occultism skill, and in a Lore skill associated with your godparent (for instance, if your godparent is an aberration, you might be trained in Aberration Lore and if they are a fey, you might be trained in Fey Lore). You can also ask them for help, but potentially at great cost. Any time you attempt a skill check to Recall Knowledge, the GM can choose to offer you a +1 circumstance bonus to the check, as though your godparent were Aiding you with a small fragment of their otherworldly knowledge. If you accept but fail the check, your godparent sends a torrent of alien information to try to "help you" more that causes you to become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute (@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Stupefied]{Stupefied 4} on a critical failure). The stupefied value can't be reduced by effects that would reduce or prevent the condition.

Touched by the Beyond.name: 彼岸所触 Touched by the Beyond
Touched by the Beyond.description:
在你的童年时期，你常常凝视深渊，最终深渊也回望着你。无论它呈现何种形态，你都经历过异常事件，并对此习以为常。你的目光如今也变得令他人不安；他们从你的眼眸深处看见彼岸的回响。

选择两个能力提升。其中一个必须提升体质或魅力，另一个为自由能力提升。

你受训于威吓（技能）以及畸变学识（技能）。你获得 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.Intimidating Glare]{Intimidating Glare} 技能专长。

Too often in your childhood, you gazed into the abyss, and eventually the abyss gazed back. Whatever form it took, you've experienced unusual occurrences and become inured to them. Your own gaze has now become unsettling to others, who see the echoes of the beyond deep within your eyes.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Constitution or Charisma, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Intimidation skill, and the Aberration Lore skill. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.Intimidating Glare]{Intimidating Glare} skill feat.

Scholar of the Unusual.name: 非凡学者 Scholar of the Unusual
Scholar of the Unusual.description:
最离奇、最怪诞的事件会令大多数人不安，但对你而言，它们却令人兴奋，是尚未探索的谜团，只等合适的人来解开……而那个人就是你！无论多么古怪，你都迫不及待地研究它、理解它，并将其记录下来。

选择两个能力提升。其中一个必须用于智力或感知，另一个为自由能力提升。

你受训于神秘技能，以及学院学识（技能）。你获得 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.Oddity Identification]{Oddity Identification} 技能专长。

The strangest and most bizarre occurrences are unsettling to most people, but to you, they are thrilling and unexplored mysteries just waiting for the right person to solve them... and that person is you! Whatever the oddity, you're all too eager to study it, understand it, and chronicle it.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Intelligence or Wisdom, and one is a free ability boost.

You're trained in the Occultism skill, and the Academia Lore skill. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.Oddity Identification]{Oddity Identification} skill feat.
